subtasks.description: Query SQL warehouse to fetch all publishers with their Q1-Q4 2024 quarterly metrics (revenue, spend, or activity volume as applicable) and compute quarter-over-quarter trends to identify those with declining patterns across multiple quarters.

Reconcile the declining publisher trends with contract and renewal state data. Apply classification logic to determine posture (hold/expand/reduce) for each declining publisher based on trend severity, contract value, and performance signals. Generate renewal recommendations.

plan.cost_rationale: Two subtasks: (1) sql_gen (mid tier) because the SQL requires multi-quarter aggregation and QoQ trend calculation across a potentially large publisher set—more complex than a simple single-quarter fetch, but does not require CTEs or window functions beyond basic aggregation. (2) cross_recon (mid tier) to reconcile SQL output with contract/renewal data and generate posture classifications and recommendations as a single analytical pass. Classification and recommendation generation are part of cross_recon's reconciliation scope, not separate policy_action subtasks. No multitool_plan or policy_action needed because the query does not ask for tool orchestration or explicit compliance/governance evaluation, only business logic posture assignment.

output.sql: WITH quarterly_metrics AS (SELECT publisher, fiscal_quarter, SUM(amount_usd) as quarterly_revenue, SUM(daily_active_seats) as quarterly_activity FROM consumption_facts WHERE fiscal_year = 2024 AND event_date >= '2024-01-01' AND event_date <= '2024-12-31' GROUP BY publisher, fiscal_quarter), publisher_trends AS (SELECT publisher, MAX(CASE WHEN fiscal_quarter = 1 THEN quarterly_revenue END) as q1_revenue, MAX(CASE WHEN fiscal_quarter = 2 THEN quarterly_revenue END) as q2_revenue, MAX(CASE WHEN fiscal_quarter = 3 THEN quarterly_revenue END) as q3_revenue, MAX(CASE WHEN fiscal_quarter = 4 THEN quarterly_revenue END) as q4_revenue, MAX(CASE WHEN fiscal_quarter = 1 THEN quarterly_activity END) as q1_activity, MAX(CASE WHEN fiscal_quarter = 2 THEN quarterly_activity END) as q2_activity, MAX(CASE WHEN fiscal_quarter = 3 THEN quarterly_activity END) as q3_activity, MAX(CASE WHEN fiscal_quarter = 4 THEN quarterly_activity END) as q4_activity FROM quarterly_metrics GROUP BY publisher) SELECT publisher, q1_revenue, q2_revenue, q3_revenue, q4_revenue, ROUND(((q2_revenue - q1_revenue) / NULLIF(q1_revenue, 0) * 100)::NUMERIC, 2) as q1_to_q2_trend_pct, ROUND(((q3_revenue - q2_revenue) / NULLIF(q2_revenue, 0) * 100)::NUMERIC, 2) as q2_to_q3_trend_pct, ROUND(((q4_revenue - q3_revenue) / NULLIF(q3_revenue, 0) * 100)::NUMERIC, 2) as q3_to_q4_trend_pct, CASE WHEN (q2_revenue < q1_revenue OR q2_revenue IS NULL) AND (q3_revenue < q2_revenue OR q3_revenue IS NULL) AND (q4_revenue < q3_revenue OR q4_revenue IS NULL) THEN 'REDUCE' WHEN (q2_revenue < q1_revenue OR q2_revenue IS NULL) AND (q3_revenue < q2_revenue OR q3_revenue IS NULL) THEN 'HOLD' WHEN q4_revenue < q1_revenue THEN 'HOLD' ELSE 'EXPAND' END as renewal_recommendation FROM publisher_trends WHERE (q2_revenue < q1_revenue OR q2_revenue IS NULL) OR (q3_revenue < q2_revenue OR q3_revenue IS NULL) OR (q4_revenue < q3_revenue OR q4_revenue IS NULL) ORDER BY publisher

output.message: No upstream MongoDB results provided for reconciliation. The task specifies a SQL query for trending data but no actual query execution results were supplied. To complete reconciliation, provide the executed output from 'fetch_publishers_q_trends' containing publisher trend records with quarterly revenue, activity metrics, and trend percentages.

expected_input_structure.mongo_source: Publisher documents with current contract state, activity status, and engagement metrics
expected_input_structure.sql_source: Query results from fetch_publishers_q_trends containing quarterly revenue trends and calculated recommendations

classification_rules.reduce: Three consecutive quarters of decline OR >50% cumulative decline across fiscal year
classification_rules.hold: Two consecutive quarters of decline OR 20-50% cumulative decline with non-zero Q4 activity
classification_rules.expand: Net positive trend across fiscal year OR Q4 revenue >= Q1 revenue
classification_rules.at_risk: Declining trend + contract expiration within 90 days + activity < historical baseline
classification_rules.no_recent_activity: Zero activity in Q3-Q4 OR zero revenue in final quarter

renewal_recommendation_mapping.REDUCE: Do not renew OR negotiate significant discount (30-50% reduction) + performance SLAs
renewal_recommendation_mapping.HOLD: Renew at current terms OR small increase if activity recovers in Q4
renewal_recommendation_mapping.EXPAND: Renew with growth incentive OR volume-based discount
